title: MinGen
description: Adds new structures to your world
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6de428f0c409213d7e2a77edd3f5a0472224edc5.png) ### **About** MinGen tries to fill the gaps in vanilla game by adding new structures and advancements. My structures doesn't look the same as vanilla ones, but i aim to keep that minimal look with small block palettes. --- ### **Structures** MinGen has **25 core structures**, with some structures having additional variations.
Structure List - Abandoned Forest House - Wells (Mangrove Well, Spruce Well, Birch Well, Pale Well and Cherry Well) - Copper Golem Fontain - Snowy Arc - Snowy Stone Peak - Stone of Destiny - Spruce Old Storage - Oak Old Storage - Islands (Mossy Island, Desert Island, Magma Island) - Hot Air Balloons (Wind, Moss, Magma) - Ice Tower - Jungle Tower - Badlands Temple - Mangrove Tower - Mangrove Shrine - Dead Tree - Forest Arc - Forest Tower - Cherry Grove Tower - Flour Mill - Old Cart - Overgrown Menhir - Undervillages (Plains Undervillage, Snowy Taiga Undervillage) - Fishingman House - Sloop
Fallen Trees (older versions only) - Oak Fallen Tree - Pale Oak Fallen Tree - Spruce Fallen Tree - Birch Fallen Tree - Cherry Fallen Tree - Acacia Fallen Tree - Dark Oak Fallen Tree - Jungle Fallen Tree
--- ### **Updates** New structures will be added over time, and the datapack will stay up to date with the latest Minecraft versions. --- ### **Old Versions Support** MinGen won't support any versions **below 1.21** due significant differences in formats. --- ### **Issues** Please report any issues or bugs on [here](https://github.com/nederliver/MinGen/issues). --- ### **Ko-fi Tips** Sadly i make like **0,50$** per day out of this datapack. Thats not too bad, but i would very much appreciate tips. --- [![ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcee84fd99ec1595fc09d46f5cb008f4f9c4bdb1.png)](https://ko-fi.com/nederliver) [![discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad5134d774636c6efd1ed2c2c42e1bb2f92ba720.png)](https://discord.gg/RpceCr4YbT) [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46b87c4b5e86f948da22fb957fcad460609064af.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mingen)
